title: Shape of You
meaning_summary: Shape of You remains a huge streaming-era catalog asset because it still converts across global pop playlists and repeat-listening loops.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models very large streaming volume, global playlist durability, songwriter participation, and pop catalog replay.

ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across writers and publishers, with Sheeran writer-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a public royalty statement.
